mission_use: Mission 25: Route handoff, Wiki, code and evidence retrieval; do not treat memory as proof.
Mission 25: Preserve compound clause relationships so a feature token cannot hide an unbound qualifier.
Mission 25: Trace semantic-accounting, tool scalar and guard call sites before patch.
Mission 25: Map tool/job ownership and caller graph across parser, orchestrator and validators.
Mission 25: Use prior Mission 24/production clues to target retrieval, then re-ground to current source.
Mission 25: Normalize HC A/A/B/B into clause-fidelity and scalar-conflict contracts.
Mission 25: Run independent RED reproduction, minimal GREEN patch and regression verification.
Mission 25: Invert the claim “BOUND means understood” and generate counterexamples.
Mission 25: Keep phase artifacts and terminal evidence separate across Mission 25.
Mission 25: Apply surgical source-owner changes only after RED evidence.
Mission 25: Decompose T00a–T12 with explicit dependencies and owners.
Mission 25: Turn F-M18/F-M20/tool-diameter conflict into reviewed learning candidates only.
Mission 25: Route independent reproducer, implementer, mutation and review roles.
Mission 25: Preserve task lifecycle and distinguish accepted work from completed evidence.
Mission 25: Separate executive synthesis from memory retrieval and candidate claims.
Mission 25: Retrieve prior failures with progressive disclosure; no automatic truth promotion.
Mission 25: Store large logs/coverage outside active context and retain compact evidence pointers.
Mission 25: Fail closed on unrepresented atoms, multiple tools and scalar conflicts.
Mission 25: Delete each new guard independently and require regression to kill the mutant.
Mission 25: Check retrieved handoff/Wiki context precision and provenance.
Mission 25: Evaluate false-allow, false-block, wrong-reason and silent-drop behavior.
Mission 25: Perform independent four-pass adversarial review after implementation.
Mission 25: Keep all execution in isolated L2 workspace with no machine route.
Mission 25: Provide reproducible shell/file workspace and artifact capture.
Mission 25: Promote reviewed contracts, evidence and limitations into typed Wiki notes.
Mission 25: Package each capability as a bounded lease with cleanup.
Mission 25: Enforce source authority, expected/forbidden traceability and evidence levels.
Mission 25: Enforce Full Agentic Work sequence from freeze through cleanup.
Mission 25: Enforce state ownership, terminal truth and worker boundaries.
Mission 25: Wiki-first compiled context and evidence-backed Mission 25 promotion.
Mission 25: Extract tool/evidence, proactive retrieval and strict-schema process patterns only.
Mission 25: Review for minimum safe patch and delete unreachable fallback code.
Mission 25: Compress final presentation only; never compress safety contracts or exact evidence.
